description: Letter from Abū Zikrī b. Abū l-Riḍā to Yeshuʿa b. Zekharya (same addressee as T-S AS 161.172). He expresses sorrow that he had neglected his service to the recipient. Note that this scribe sometimes writes אל when he means א. (Information in part from Goitein index cards)
description_he: מכתב מאבו זכרי ב' אבו אל-ריד'א לישועה ב' זכריה. מביע צער שהזניח את שירותו לנמען.
